
# foreman_location


Foreman representation of a location.


## Example Usage

```
# Autogenerated example with required keys
data "foreman_location" "example" {
  name = "DC1"
}
```


## Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

- `name` - (Required) The name of the location.


## Attributes Reference

The following attributes are exported:

- `description` - Description of the location.
- `name` - The name of the location.
- `parameters` - A map of parameters that will be saved as location parameters.
- `parent_id` - ID of the parent location.
- `title` - Full title of the location (includes parent hierarchy).
